Personal informationPhotoVideoTeam with your privacy in mind, so we do not collect personally identifiable information about you. In other words, we do not collect information such as your name, address, phone number, email address or precise geographic location.

PermissionsAll permissions, we do not collect any thing, just for app in local. and we never publicly disclose any personal or sensitive user data related to financial or payment activities or any government identification numbers, photos and contacts, etc.

Childrens Online Privacy Protection ActWe are in compliance with the requirements of COPPA (Childrens Online Privacy Protection Act), we do not collect any information from anyone under 13 years of age.
AdvertisingAll ads in our App served by Google's AdMob network. AdMob may use and collect anonymous data about your interests to customize

advertising in our App and in other sites and apps. To do that AdMob using unique user-resettable Advertising ID, provided by Google Play services. Interest and location data may be linked to your device, but is not linked to your identity. To learn more about AdMob privacy policies and opt-out choices check outGoogle's privacy policy. And we use Facebook Ads too, the related privacy is described by Facebook, see more details in https://m.facebook.com/ads/ad_choices

ChangesWe will post any privacy policy changes on this page and, if the changes are significant, we will provide a more prominent notice. If you have any questions or concerns about our privacy policies.
